title: Sorghum gidarba
taxonomy: Sorghum gidarba is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Sorghum, which includes a variety of grasses native to tropical and subtropical regions. The species is native to Africa and is often found growing in areas with poor soil quality. The classification of Sorghum gidarba is further divided into various taxonomic ranks, including kingdom, phylum, class, order, family, genus, and species. It is considered a unique and relatively rare species within the Sorghum genus.
